productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Explosive Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and delicate chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean Turn your training session into an explosive one with this fiery red t-shirt from nike. Feel absolutely dry and comfortable in the tee, especially engineered with Dri-Fit technology to wick away sweat and keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with tracks or jeans in case you want to drop your workout session and just hang out with friends.
